overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a pole dancer performing in a dimly lit nightclub bathed in vibrant pink and green neon light. The camera smoothly glides forward and orbits around the central stage, showcasing the game's detailed cyberpunk aesthetic and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub with central performance stage

events.description: camera transitions from forward approach to orbiting around the pole dancer

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the central stage and circling to observe the pole dancer's performance from multiple angles

notable_agents.action: performing acrobatic pole dance routine with spins, climbs, and inverted aerial maneuvers

entered.detail: raised platform with glowing pink surface and geometric patterns
vertical metallic pole extending from floor to ceiling for performance
overhead U-shaped structure emitting intense pink and red light
curved counter with green neon trim and patrons seated nearby
large screen displaying animated cyberpunk advertisements
various glowing signs and linear light strips on dark walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk nightclub interior dominated by a pink-lit central stage. A dancer performs acrobatic maneuvers on a chrome pole as the camera smoothly approaches from a distance. Around the 8-second mark, the camera begins orbiting the performer, revealing green neon bar lighting and holographic advertisements in the background while maintaining focus on the spinning, climbing dancer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a distant view of a neon-lit stage and evolves into an intimate, orbiting perspective of a performer. It begins by gliding forward through a cyberpunk nightclub interior, focusing on a dancer executing acrobatic maneuvers on a chrome pole under a dominant pink glow. As the camera closes the distance, the linear approach shifts into a smooth orbit around the central stage, gradually unveiling the wider environment. This rotation expands the view to reveal contrasting green neon bar lighting and flickering holographic advertisements in the background while maintaining a tight focus on the spinning, climbing dancer.
